Fiscal year: Financial period during which the project was active, spanning two calendar years.
Programming process (new): Stage of project development before the approval process.
Status: Current state of the project, indicating if it is completed.
Organisation class: Type of organization involved in the project, categorized as individual or entity.
Sector name: Field or industry the project is associated with, such as civil society or privatization.
Project number: Unique identifier assigned to each project.
Climate change adaptation (marker): Indicator showing if the project involves climate change adaptation (0 for no).
Organisation ID: Unique identifier for the organization, but information is not available in the dataset.
Organisation name: Name of the organization involved in the project, but information is not available in the dataset.
Desertification (marker): Indicator showing if the project involves desertification (0 for no).
Bilateral aid (international marker): Indicator for bilateral aid (1 for yes, 0 for no).
Division name: Name of the division responsible for the project.
Amount spent: Total amount of money spent on the project.
Sector percent: Percentage of the project's budget allocated to a specific sector.
Section name: Name of the section managing the project.
Project Browser country ID: Country identifier used in the project browser.
ICT as a tool for development (marker): Indicator for ICT usage in development (1 for yes, 0 for no).
Continent name: Name of the continent where the project is located.
CountryRegion name: Name of the country or region where the project is located.
Section ID: Unique identifier for the section managing the project.
Indigenous issues (marker): Binary indicator for projects involving indigenous issues.
Youth issues (marker): Binary indicator for projects involving youth issues.
CIDA business delivery model (old): Old CIDA business delivery model type.
Children issues (marker): Binary indicator for projects involving children issues.
Disability issues (marker): Binary indicator for projects involving disability issues.
Organisation type: Type of organization involved in the project.
Biodiversity (marker): Binary indicator for projects involving biodiversity issues.
CountryRegion percent: Percentage of project focus on a specific country or region.
Regional program (marker): Indicator for regional program funding, binary (0/1).
FSTC percent: Percentage related to FSTC, likely funding or contribution.
Participatory development and good gover: Indicator for participatory development and good governance funding, binary (0/1).
Maximum CIDA contribution (project-level: Maximum contribution by CIDA at project level.
Branch name: Name of the branch managing the project.
Fund centre ID: Unique identifier for the fund centre.
IRTC percent: Percentage related to IRTC, likely indicating some form of rate or ratio, all samples are 0%.
PBA type: Indicates whether the project involves PBA (Preservation Building Assessment), all samples indicate absence.
Enviromental sustainability (marker): Marker for environmental sustainability, scored numerically, all samples indicate no sustainability efforts.
